topic: 近年来Agent Memory有哪些研究方向？

messages.speaker: ManagerAgent
messages.content: Planning result: 1. 明确研究问题与关键词；2. 使用arXiv检索并过滤候选论文；3. 阅读摘要和可选本地PDF片段；4. 提取贡献、方法、方向分类和证据；5. 反思局限与风险；6. 生成报告、思维导图和长期记忆更新。

tool_logs.query: 近年来Agent Memory有哪些研究方向？
expanded_queries: (ti:"agent memory" OR abs:"agent memory" OR ti:"memory augmented agent" OR abs:"memory augmented agent")

papers.title: A Survey on the Memory Mechanism of Large Language Model based Agents
papers.summary: This survey summarizes memory modules for LLM agents, including working memory, episodic memory, semantic memory, retrieval, and reflection-driven consolidation.

papers.title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
papers.summary: The paper introduces generative agents with memory streams, reflection, and planning to produce believable long-horizon behavior.

papers.title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
papers.summary: Reflexion lets language agents store verbal feedback from previous attempts and reuse it as memory for future decision making.

papers.title: MemGPT: Towards LLMs as Operating Systems
papers.summary: MemGPT proposes virtual context management that moves information between limited context windows and longer-term storage.

papers.title: MemoryBank: Enhancing Large Language Models with Long-Term Memory
papers.summary: MemoryBank explores persistent user-level memory, forgetting, and retrieval to improve personalized LLM interactions.

search_queries: (ti:"agent memory" OR abs:"agent memory" OR ti:"memory augmented agent" OR abs:"memory augmented agent")
